=== Metadata ===
Effect version: unknown

/.src/cryptoRandomUUID_preview.ts(4,24): warning TS377078: This code uses `crypto.randomUUID()`, prefer the Effect `Random` module instead because it uses Effect-injected randomness rather than the `crypto` module behind the scenes. effect(cryptoRandomUUID)


==== /.src/cryptoRandomUUID_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics cryptoRandomUUID:warning
    
    export const preview = crypto.randomUUID()
                           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377078: This code uses `crypto.randomUUID()`, prefer the Effect `Random` module instead because it uses Effect-injected randomness rather than the `crypto` module behind the scenes. effect(cryptoRandomUUID)
